title: Section 3
content: In this Act, "Collector" 1means the Collector of land-revenue of a district, or the Deputy Commissioner, or any officer empowered by the State Government by name or by virtue of his office to discharge the functions of a Collector under this Act.
footnote: 1. Cf. the definition in s. 3 (10) of the General Clauses Act, 1897 (10 of 1897).
